action.reasoning: Observation: seed-123 DINO 4e is the new best standalone at 0.6281 and has complementary recalls to the previous best 0.6/0.4 DINO ensemble: much better bobcat/cat/empty, but worse bird/dog/opossum/squirrel. Analysis: this is an ideal low-cost ensembling opportunity. Since the new seed is already the best individual model, give it substantial weight while retaining the prior 4e/10e mixture to recover classes where seed-123 is weak. Decision: create a 3-model DINO ensemble equivalent to 50% seed-123 + 50% previous best ensemble, i.e. weights 0.30/0.20/0.50 for dino_4e/dino_10e/dino_4e_s123, and submit it for evaluation.
action.command:
python - <<'PY'
import torch, os
ckpt = {
    'ensemble': [
        {'checkpoint': 'checkpoints/dino_4e.pt', 'weight': 0.30},
        {'checkpoint': 'checkpoints/dino_10e.pt', 'weight': 0.20},
        {'checkpoint': 'checkpoints/dino_4e_s123.pt', 'weight': 0.50},
    ],
    'img_size': 224,
    'mean': [0.485, 0.456, 0.406],
    'std': [0.229, 0.224, 0.225],
    'num_classes': 10,
}
os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)
torch.save(ckpt, 'checkpoints/dino_ens_4_10_s123_w302050.pt')
print('saved checkpoints/dino_ens_4_10_s123_w302050.pt')
PY
